hero.headline:
Automate.
Optimize.
Perform.
hero.sub: PICO Industrial designs and deploys custom automation systems for Moroccan industry — from the shop floor to supervision.

solutions.title: Our Solutions
solutions.sub: From design to commissioning, we cover the full cycle of your industrial project.

automation.title: Automation & PLCs
automation.desc: Programming of Siemens, Schneider and Allen-Bradley PLCs. SCADA, HMI, industrial communication.

cnc.title: CNC & Machining
cnc.desc: CNC machine retrofitting, LinuxCNC/MACH3 integration, servo axes and high-speed spindles.

energy.title: Energy Management
energy.desc: Energy monitoring, real-time dashboards, reduction of consumption and costs.

iot.title: Industrial IoT
iot.desc: Connected sensors, MQTT/OPC-UA gateways, Grafana dashboards, SMS/email alerts.

textile.title: Textile & Garment
textile.desc: Production line supervision, piece counting, real-time yield and quality tracking.

lpg.title: LPG & Safety
lpg.desc: Gas detection systems, motorized valves, certified alarms and LPG station remote management.

projects.title: Completed Projects
projects.sub: A few examples of what we have accomplished for our clients.
